title: agalinis peduncularis
intro: Agalinis peduncularis, also known as snake root, is a perennial plant native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in reducing pain and inflammation. Agalinis peduncularis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine.
